title: No Compromises
description: A no compromises modpack, to fit everything you might need to enjoy Minecraft!
body:
## No Compromises
No Compromises was made to fill out the gap between **useful and optimized**, delivering both. The main focus to make combat **as enjoyable as** possible while keeping the HUD simple and non-obstrusive. **FPS has doubled from Vanilla** in my testing. 



## Modpack contains features such as:
- 3d Skin Layers
- Apple Skin
- Nicer chat
- ViaFabric+
- Optimisation
- Various QoL features
- Optifine features

## AMD and NVIDIA compatibility
For AMD, I suggest trying out [VulcanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) and [VulkanBobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanbobby) for better performance.

For Nvidia, [Reflex AntiLag](https://modrinth.com/mod/reflex-antilag) is always an option, though only for advanced users.
